allowed_changes: Replace foo.md/bar.md/baz.md/qux.md anchor-path style identifiers in notice-line grammar examples with kebab-case slugs (no .md extension) (lines ~470-473)

rationale: Two isolated terminology drift sites where v1 'marker' vocabulary and anchor-path-as-token style persist. Authoritative vocabulary in next.md uses 'slug' and kebab-case identifiers without .md extensions. Fix is purely textual: align the docs to the v2 design without semantic change.
